# ShadowCraft
> Premium Tailwind CSS shadow library with multi-layer volumetric box-shadow utilities.

ShadowCraft is a production-ready design system for UI depth. It ships as an npm Tailwind CSS plugin (@nevil5249/shadowcraft) and includes a documentation website with a browsable shadow library and interactive playground.

## Primary URLs
- Website: https://shadowcraft.nevilgadhia.in
- NPM Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nevil5249/shadowcraft
- GitHub: https://github.com/nevil5249
- Author: https://www.nevilgadhia.in

## Pages
- Home: https://shadowcraft.nevilgadhia.in/ — Overview, features, installation
- Library: https://shadowcraft.nevilgadhia.in/library — Browse shadows by category
- Playground: https://shadowcraft.nevilgadhia.in/playground — Real-time multi-layer shadow generator
- Docs: https://shadowcraft.nevilgadhia.in/docs — React, Next.js, HTML integration guides
- Legal: https://shadowcraft.nevilgadhia.in/legal — Terms, privacy, security

## What ShadowCraft Provides
- Handcrafted box-shadow utilities (classes like shd-subtle-01, shd-floating-modal, shd-glass)
- Categories: Elevation, Inset, Glass, Floating, Ambient, Structural, Crisp, Diffused, Blueprint, Volumetric, Geometric, Micro, Colorful, Neumorphism, Material, Directional, Glow, Dark Mode, Skeuomorphic, Cinematic
- Tailwind CSS v4 and v3 support
- Copy-to-clipboard: class names, raw CSS, Tailwind arbitrary values

## Installation
```bash
npm install @nevil5249/shadowcraft
```

Tailwind v4:
```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@plugin "@nevil5249/shadowcraft";
```

Tailwind v3:
```js
plugins: [require('@nevil5249/shadowcraft')]
```

## Keywords
tailwind css shadows, box shadow plugin, volumetric shadows, multi-layer shadows, ui depth, elevation shadows, neumorphism, material design shadows, dark mode shadows, shadow generator, css shadow library, tailwind utility classes, saas design system
